candidates.name: Tech Stack Fingerprint Pro
candidates.pitch: Analyzes HTTP headers, script tags, CDN fingerprints, and meta tags to identify frameworks, CDNs, analytics, and hosting. One engineer can build the detection rules engine in 2-3 weeks. Wappalyzer exi
candidates.pain: Wasting time reverse-engineering what stack a prospect's site uses before outreach or debugging.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Proxy Config Proxy Switcher
candidates.pitch: One-click switch between saved proxy profiles, auto-rotate user agents per profile, logs requests through active proxy. Built in 2 weeks. Proxyman exists but desktop-only with no one-click browser swi
candidates.pain: Switching between multiple proxy configurations for testing requires digging into OS settings every time.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Webhook Signature Debugger
candidates.pitch: Intercepts webhook requests, runs real-time HMAC verification against stored secrets, shows pass/fail with hex diffs. Ships as DevTools panel + local secret store. Built in 1-2 weeks. NGROK has tunnel
candidates.pain: Webhook signature validation failures waste hours debugging payloads and shared secrets.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Page Resource Waterfall Analyzer
candidates.pitch: Parses Performance API entries, renders a cleaner waterfall, highlights resources >1s and flags render-blocking scripts. Exports as PNG/PDF for sprint reports. Built in 2 weeks. Fullstory and Datadog
candidates.pain: Identifying slow resources in DevTools waterfall charts is tedious and not shareable with non-technical stakeholders.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Stripe Event Schema Validator

candidates.pain: Debugging Stripe webhook failures means manually comparing payloads against docs with no real-time validation.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: AI Token Usage by Tab
candidates.pitch: Proxies LLM API calls via background script, tracks tokens per domain/tab in real-time, shows running cost totals. OpenAI/Anthropic billing APIs enable this. Built in 2 weeks. Cursor has token counter
candidates.pain: Running ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini simultaneously makes it impossible to track cumulative spend.

candidates.name: Support Sentiment Trend Monitor
candidates.pitch: Integrates with Zendesk/Intercom API, runs lightweight sentiment scoring on ticket text over time, surfaces weekly digest of declining CSAT and rising negative keywords. Built in 3 weeks. Gainsight ex
candidates.pain: Support teams see tickets individually but miss macro trends indicating product friction or churn risk.

candidates.name: Job Posting Tech Signal Extractor
candidates.pitch: Scrapes LinkedIn/Indeed job descriptions, extracts tech keywords (AWS, React, Postgres), builds a quick tech profile for the target company. Built in 2 weeks. LinkedIn Sales Navigator has some signals
candidates.pain: Scoping enterprise sales deals by manually reading job postings to guess tech stack is slow and inconsistent.

candidates.name: Feature Flag Health Reporter
candidates.pitch: Connects to LaunchDarkly/Flagsmith/etc API, surfaces flags not toggled in 30+ days, flags with contradictory rules, and generates a weekly digest. One API integration + dashboard in ~3 weeks. Competit
candidates.pain: Feature flags pile up silently until nobody knows which ones are stale, active, or causing conflicts.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Notion Backlink Graph Viewer
candidates.pitch: Uses Notion API to index all page links, renders a force-directed graph showing connections. Highlights orphan pages. Built in 2 weeks. Notion itself shows backlinks but not a visual graph view.
candidates.pain: Notion wikis grow into invisible webs where you can't tell what links to what without clicking every page.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: GitHub Codeowner Coverage Checker

candidates.pain: CODEOWNERS files silently decay until PRs get stuck because nobody is actually responsible.

candidates.name: Meet Engagement Pulse

candidates.pain: Sales reps can't prove prospects were engaged during demos unless they manually review recordings.
